version_description: Based on the studio album. Standard chords are used.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F/A[/ch] [ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch]
[ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch] 

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]        [ch]F/A[/ch]          [ch]Gm[/ch]
You and I,    in this moment,[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Eb[/ch]                   [ch]Bb/F[/ch] [ch]F7[/ch]
Holding the night so close.[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]F/A[/ch]          [ch]Gm[/ch]
Hanging on    still unbroken,[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Eb[/ch]                   [ch]Bb/F[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]
While outside the thunder rolls[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab] [ch]Eb[/ch]
Listen now,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb/D[/ch]
You can hear our heartbeat,[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]                          [ch]Gm[/ch]
Warm against life's bitter cold.[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Eb[/ch]
These are the days,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Cm7add11[/ch]   [ch]F7sus[/ch]
The sweetest days we'll know.[/tab]

[Interlude]
[ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F/A[/ch] [ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch]
[ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch]

[Verse 2]
[tab] [ch]Bb[/ch]            [ch]F/A[/ch]        [ch]Gm[/ch]
There are times    that scare me,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Eb[/ch]                         [ch]Bb/F[/ch]  [ch]F7[/ch]
You rattle the house like the wind.[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bb[/ch]        [ch]F/A[/ch]        [ch]Gm[/ch]
Both of us      so unbending,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Eb[/ch]                  [ch]Bb/F[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]
We battle the fear we feel.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab] [ch]Eb[/ch]
All the while,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb/D[/ch]
Life is rushing by us.[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]                       [ch]Gm[/ch]
Hold it now and don't let go.[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Eb[/ch]
These are the days,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Cm7add11[/ch]   [ch]F7sus[/ch]    [ch]Bbsus[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Bbsus[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]
The sweetest days we'll know.[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab]          [ch]Bb/D[/ch]         [ch]Eb[/ch]
So we'll whisper our dreams,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]
Here in the darkness.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb/D[/ch]          [ch]Eb[/ch]
Watching the stars,[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F7sus[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
Till they're gone.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bb/D[/ch]     [ch]Eb[/ch]
And when even the memories,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]Gm[/ch]
Have all faded a  - way,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]              [ch]F7sus[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]
These days go on and on.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab] [ch]Eb[/ch]
Listen now,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb/D[/ch]
You can hear our heartbeat,[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]                      [ch]Gm[/ch]
Hold me now and don't let go.[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Eb[/ch]
These are the days,[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Cm7add11[/ch]  [ch]F7sus[/ch]      [ch]Gm[/ch]
Every day is the sweetest   day we'll know.[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Eb[/ch]
These are the days,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Cm7add11[/ch] [ch]F7sus[/ch]
The sweetest  days we'll know.[/tab]

[Outro]
[ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F/A[/ch] [ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch]
[ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Eb2[/ch]
